title: No access control on PUT /config or /config/radio
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_config.c:668,747. spec/11-lci.md §17.6.3: PUT /config is Admin-level; §17.6.2 calls for OSCORE on sensitive operations. No access check at all — any mesh peer can change node name/role and radio params (freq_mhz, sf, sync_word, tx_power_dbm), remotely partitioning or hijacking the node's radio. Fix: apply the (fixed) local-admin gate to all config writes.
